title: Evidence manifest, fingerprint, and resumable scan contract
acceptance: manifest 能記錄 bodyStart/bodyEnd telemetry 與 body-boundary residual proposal 引用。
resume 不需要每輪掃描完整 artifact tree，並能偵測缺檔、重複與 hash mismatch。
manifest schema 有 smoke fixture 與 regression check。
notes: 2026-05-21 | 狀態: closed | 驗證: smoke-test-6-pass | 變更: 產出 evidence-manifest schema/fixture + evidence_manifest.py 驗證模組 + 6 項 resume regression 測試（含 missing/duplicate/hash mismatch）| 阻塞: none
